name: epub-ir-import
title: 整合 EPUB 导入并优化渐进阅读建书流程
description: Plan the migration of orca-epub into the SRS plugin while preserving plain-note import and adding a reliable progressive-reading handoff.
scope: EPUB import, Orca outline persistence, and progressive-reading book initialization
creator: samdagreat
notes: Planning-only handoff. No legacy orca-epub book migration is required because the feature has not entered production.
